purpose: Help the PPT AI Agent choose copyable TSX blueprints for Red Blue Comparison decks, then derive final pages into slides/*.tsx and edit implementation directly.

components.role: Reusable cross-slide visual components for the red-blue comparison system.

blueprints.role: Copyable TSX blueprint pages. Start here when selecting a page structure.

slides.role: Final registered slide entries. group.json.layouts and manifest.json source.path must only reference this directory.

data.role: Demo or deck content data. JSON carries content only, not page structure decisions.

theme.role: Shared color, typography, and visual token definitions.

blueprints.name: Cover Comparison
blueprints.visual_pattern: centered comparison title + comparison connector/separator + topic scope line + sideA/sideB entity legend + soft circular decorations

blueprints.name: Topic Overview
blueprints.visual_pattern: left-aligned title block + subtitle + 3x2 numbered icon cards + soft sideA/sideB/comparison background circles

blueprints.name: Economy Size Growth
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary vertical comparison bar chart + right stacked rank and bar metric cards + soft sideA/sideB/comparison circular decorations

blueprints.name: Economic Structure
blueprints.visual_pattern: two side-by-side entity cards + screenshot-safe donut charts + center share callouts + legends + concise analysis boxes
avoid_for: more than two primary entity cards

blueprints.name: Demographics Snapshot
blueprints.visual_pattern: two side-by-side entity cards + top sideA/sideB accent rail + large hero metric + status indicator + compact KPI rows
avoid_for: more than two primary entity cards

blueprints.name: Aging Dependency
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary 100% stacked horizontal composition chart + right elderly-share metric callouts + comparison conclusion card + soft circular decorations
suitable_for: two to four entity part-to-whole comparison

blueprints.name: Population Trend
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary dual-axis line chart with historical and projected segments + source note + right vertical insight cards with semantic accent rails

blueprints.name: Technology Innovation KPIs
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary radar ecosystem profile with entity legend + source note + right strategic insight card and compact two-entity KPI rows
suitable_for: radar chart with supporting KPI evidence

blueprints.name: Evidence Image Table
blueprints.visual_pattern: left primary image showcase with caption and source + right compact comparison table with semantic emphasis cells + concise evidence note
avoid_for: more than one primary visual asset

blueprints.name: Historical Milestones Timeline
blueprints.visual_pattern: centered title + soft comparison horizontal axis + alternating milestone text blocks + rounded date pills + comparison diamond markers + soft circular decorations
suitable_for: strategic roadmap with three to six phases

blueprints.name: Closing Contact
blueprints.visual_pattern: large centered thank-you title + comparison URL pill + contact panel + soft comparison circular decorations

selection_guide.when: The page is an opening slide with two compared entities and a short scope list.
The page introduces four to six sections, pillars, or comparison dimensions.
The page compares absolute scale or benchmark metrics with one primary bar chart.
The page compares part-to-whole composition for exactly two entities.
selection_guide.choose: economic-structure for donut composition, aging-dependency for horizontal stacked composition

selection_guide.when: The page compares two entity profiles with one hero number and compact KPIs.
The page compares historical and projected trajectories over time.
The page compares two entities across multiple capability dimensions and needs a radar chart plus KPI sidebar.
The page needs one primary image, map, photo, screenshot, or visual asset plus a compact editable comparison table.
The page needs a concise chronological arc with three to six key milestones.
The page is the final thank-you/contact slide and should stay low density.

agent_workflow_notes: Read catalog.json first and choose the blueprint closest to the page intent.
Copy or derive the selected blueprint into slides/*.tsx before adapting it.
group.json.layouts and manifest.json source.path must only reference slides/*.tsx.
Do not paste source HTML into TSX; extract reusable components and page blueprints.
Use data/*.json for content replacement only; change slides/*.tsx for structure, spacing, and component composition.
